tasks.label: test
tasks.command: f='${input:testFilter}'; cmd='uv run pytest tests/core/ tests/worker/ -v'; [ "$f" != "*" ] && cmd="$cmd -k $f"; eval $cmd

tasks.label: test:integration
tasks.command: set -a; source .env; set +a; export DOCRUNR_INTEGRATION_STORAGE=local; export RABBITMQ_HOST=127.0.0.1; export DOCRUNR_HEALTH_URL="http://127.0.0.1:${HEALTH_PORT:-8080}/health"; src='${input:integrationSampleSource}'; n='${input:integrationSampleCount}'; cmd='uv run pytest tests/integration -v'; if [ -n "$n" ] && [ "$n" != "0" ] && [ "$n" != "*" ]; then cmd="$cmd --integration-sample-limit=$n"; fi; export INTEGRATION_SAMPLE_SOURCE="$src"; eval $cmd

tasks.label: test:integration:minio
tasks.command: set -a; source .env; set +a; export DOCRUNR_INTEGRATION_STORAGE=minio; export RABBITMQ_HOST=127.0.0.1; export DOCRUNR_HEALTH_URL="http://127.0.0.1:${HEALTH_PORT:-8080}/health"; export DOCRUNR_INTEGRATION_MINIO_ENDPOINT="127.0.0.1:${MINIO_PORT:-9000}"; src='${input:integrationSampleSource}'; n='${input:integrationSampleCount}'; cmd='uv run pytest tests/integration -v'; if [ -n "$n" ] && [ "$n" != "0" ] && [ "$n" != "*" ]; then cmd="$cmd --integration-sample-limit=$n"; fi; export INTEGRATION_SAMPLE_SOURCE="$src"; eval $cmd

tasks.label: download:samples
tasks.command: mime='${input:downloadMimeType}'; n='${input:downloadDocCount}'; uv run python -m tests.downloads "$mime" "$n"

tasks.label: docker:run
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.base.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml up -d --build --remove-orphans && docker compose -f docker-compose.base.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml ps

tasks.label: docker:run:minio
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.base.yml -f docker-compose.minio.yml up -d --build --remove-orphans && docker compose -f docker-compose.base.yml -f docker-compose.minio.yml ps

tasks.label: release
tasks.command: v='${input:releaseVersion}'; if [ -z "$v" ]; then printf '\n' | ./scripts/release.sh --push; else ./scripts/release.sh --version "$v" --push; fi

inputs.description: Sample file count for e2e jobs (tests/samples or .data/downloads). 0 or * = all.
Mimetype or extension alias (e.g. pdf, docx, application/pdf). Comma-separated is supported.
Number of documents to download per mimetype.
Version X.Y.Z, or leave empty for automatic patch bump (recommended in VS Code tasks).
